title: specgen: add support for ambient capabilities
body:
if the kernel supports ambient capabilities (Linux 4.3+), also set them when running with euid != 0.

This is different that what Moby does, as ambient capabilities are never set.

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>
